params.name: Storyteller
params.description:
On Jan 16, 1957, this terracotta Storyteller was unearthed in the tomb on a cliff of Tianhui Mountain in Chengdu.

The Eastern Han Dynasty's terracotta Storyteller demonstrates ancient folk art. It may seem absurd but its plain look was inspired by the ancient street performers. This frowning terracotta holds a drum and a stick with its mouth open, looking as if it is telling an incredible story.

[Basic Info]

Era: Eastern Han Dynasty

Height: 56 cm

Material: Terracotta clay

Collected by: Nat …
